title: The Change of the 1st Angel to the 13th Angel
display_title: The Change of the 1st Angel to the 13th Angel
wikitext:
[]: The Change of the 1st Angel to the 13th Angel             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jan 08, 2013 9:00 am [Title edited to maximize clarity. Was "1st and 13th..." - Monk] At what point does Kaworu change from being the first to the thirteenth angel? How, and what happens; and what's the significance of it anyway? I've had a look around and failed to find any explanation for this, even though it gets mentioned in passing from time to time.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jan 08, 2013 1:21 pm It probably happened when his soul transmigrated to his lilin-shaped body, similar to when he became Tabris in the original continuity.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpha » Tue Jan 08, 2013 1:29 pm Actually, it would seem that his "demoting" happened right as Eva 13 pseudo-evolved.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Tue Jan 08, 2013 3:11 pm When I saw the thread title I thought that it was about the Eva's. Anyways, who knows what the hell was going on. We'll probably never get an explination about it.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jan 08, 2013 3:23 pm I thought this forum could manage a theory for anything . But I take it that that there is no further explanation in canon, so I haven't missed anything.

[]:             Quote Post by ShikinamiFan » Tue Jan 08, 2013 4:19 pm Maybe Eva 13 is the real Adam (Mari says is an Adams Survivor, maybe she refers as "The surviving Adam") and when it awakens it means that the resident soul inside its "Control System" has taken Kaworu's place as Adams missing soul. With no Adam's body available to fuse with, Kaworu refered himself as being cast down to number 13th.

[]:             Quote Post by KingBungleHole » Wed Aug 07, 2013 11:13 pm [Merged from 3.33 Things You Noticed. - Monk] Idk if this belongs in this thread or not, but I have a theory on Kaworu's whole "I fell to become the thirteenth angel" thing. Ok so when unit 13 awakened it contained the body of a surviving Adam and the soul of Adam (Kaworu) so I think that Kaworu truly merged with the unit, that'a why he didn't even have to move his arms in the entry plug to impale unit 13 with the spears. If the dss choker can prevent someone from syncing with and Eva it would explain why kaworu did nothing to stop Shinji from pulling out the spears, but when Kaworu "became the thirteenth angel" he was able to move the arms around perfectly. I also believe what happened at the end of 2.22 is similar to this because unit 1 had awakend and unit 1 is a clone of Lilith which came in contact with the soul of Lilith, which was Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Aug 07, 2013 11:17 pm I doubt that latter part is true, not for any mechanical/in universe reason, but because that would mean that the apocalypse wasn't directly, totally Shinji's fault.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Aug 08, 2013 6:08 am ^ Well, that's already what many people think : Shinji was just saving Rei and didn't had any idea of the price that was about to being paid(nor that there was even a price to pay), and what Kaworu showed and explained about 3I don't fit at all with what we saw at the end of 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Zoop » Fri Aug 09, 2013 12:12 pm Well Shijnji might not have known exactly what the concequences of his actions were, but his mindset was pretty much "fuck the world, gimme Ayanami". Whether intentional or not, at that point, the whole world could end and Shinji wouldnt give a shit, as long as he could save Ayanami. Most probably, that mindset and his willpower caused the Eva to "grant his wish". Altough I do believe Shinji only caused N3E, which was resumed later. Thus, Shinji would be more of a Scapegoat than actually responsible for everything. The 3.0 preview shows that Nerv personel has been captured. What if N3E resumed without any of the old Nerv personel present? They come back to Tokyo later and find it in the state it is now. Without any extra information, ofcourse everyone would blame Shinji for it. On Topic: The 13th angel shouldn't exist. I believe mankind was supposed to be the last Angel (just like in NGE) and mankind would have become so if Seele's impact turned into Instrumentility. But thanks to some Gendo trickery, it is performed on Kaworu instead. There are a lot of themes that suggest looping, or the exact opposite (the human heart lacks reversebility, you can (not) redo). By tying the end to the beginning (from the first angel to the last) a loop is created. Instead of a line that goes from 1 to 12, 13 goes back to 1, creating a circle. thus 13 is the same as 1 (going from midnight to 1 o clock), just like Kaworu says, te beginning and the end are one and the same thing. I keep getting this idea in my head, but it doesn't really explain anything :) apparantly it is according to Gendo's plan. What it signifies or what exactly happened remains unclear even if we do fanwank a theory on what it means to demote from the 1st angel to the 13th.
